/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -Wall CMakeFiles/bbs_benchmark.dir/src/Party1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bbs_benchmark.dir/src/Party2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bbs_benchmark.dir/src/zk_sigma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bbs_benchmark.dir/src/ecvrf_p256.c.o CMakeFiles/bbs_benchmark.dir/src/ecvrf_test.c.o CMakeFiles/bbs_benchmark.dir/src/bbs_benchmark.cpp.o -o bbs_benchmark  -Wl,-rpath,/project/fei/Two-party_Two_Pass_BBS_Plus_Implementation/build/lib lib/libmcl.so.1.74 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmpxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
